clusters.title: Trump-Backed Candidates Win GOP Senate Runoffs in Alabama and Georgia
clusters.summary: Rep. Barry Moore has won the Republican primary runoff for an open Senate seat in Alabama, defeating former Navy SEAL Jared Hudson. Meanwhile, Rep. Mike Collins secured victory in the Georgia GOP Senate runoff, setting the stage for a competitive race against incumbent Jon Ossoff. These results highlight the influence of Trump endorsements in shaping Republican candidates for the upcoming general elections.

clusters.title: Gov. Gavin Newsom Claims DOJ Investigation by Trump's Administration

Newsom characterized the investigation as baseless and part of a broader pattern of political attacks. The situation raises questions about the intersection of politics and law enforcement in the current climate.

The trial will explore the intersection of mental health issues and criminal responsibility.

clusters.title: Starmer Offers Cabinet Role to Burnham Amid By-Election Challenge
clusters.summary: Keir Starmer has expressed his support for Andy Burnham, suggesting he would offer him a cabinet position if Burnham wins the upcoming by-election in Makerfield. Starmer emphasized the importance of focusing on future Labour leadership dynamics, advising Burnham to prioritize the subsequent Manchester mayoral race rather than pursuing an immediate leadership challenge.

items.title: Keir Starmer signals he would give Andy Burnham a cabinet job
items.description:
PM says Greater Manchester mayor is ‘huge asset’ who can play big part in Labour government if he wins byelection

  • UK politics live – latest updates

Keir Starmer has indicated he would give Andy Burnham a cabinet job, describing him as a “huge asset”, as he attempted to head off a challenge to his leadership that is expected to come after the Makerfield byelection on Thursday.

Allies of Burnham said the Greater Manchester mayor would not be interested in serving under Starmer if he returned to Westminster.

Continue reading...

items.title: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
items.description: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.
